# llms.txt for seoplant.io
> SEOplant is the AI Programmatic SEO Platform that turns keywords into ranking websites.

## About
- SEOplant: https://seoplant.io
- GitHub: https://github.com/RichardDu1/seoplant
- Docs: https://seoplant.io/docs

- Home: https://seoplant.io
- Pricing: https://seoplant.io/pricing

## Core Features
- Competitor Intelligence Engine
- SEO/GEO Strategy Generator
- Programmatic SEO at Scale (5000+ pages)
- Astro Static Site Factory
- One-Click VPS Deployment
